docs.title: Home
docs.text:
What is Stylebook?

  • Library extension A set of additional rules for static code analysis tools
  • Simplified CLI One command to lint multiple file types

How does it work?

flowchart LR
  subgraph "Project"
    src(Source code)
    config1[Optional config files]
  end
  subgraph "Static analysis"
    linters[Linter libraries]
    extensions[Rule extensions]
    config2[Default config files]
  end
  subgraph "Report"
    cli[Build failure<br>on lint errors]
  end
  subgraph "Refactor"
    manual(Manual edits<br>using suggestions)
  end

  src -- run --> linters
  extensions -- CLI --> cli
  cli -- fix --> manual

docs.title: Download
docs.text:
Get the artifacts from official package managers.

Download the library

PyPI NPM

docs.title: Indent style
docs.text:
Spaces over hard tabs for indentation, default 2 spaces.

Before

- Foo
    - Bar
        - Baz

After

- Foo
  - Bar
    - Baz

docs.title: Line length
docs.text:
The column limit is 80 characters.

Before

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Donec a diam lectus. Sed sit amet ipsum.

After

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Donec a diam lectus.
Sed sit amet ipsum.

Tip

There are some exceptions:

  • URLs are allowed to exceed the limit in most formats.
  • In Markdown, headings, tables and inline HTML are also fine.
  • Ignored in JSON.

docs.title: Trailing comma
docs.text:
No trailing commas in JSON5 files.

Before

{
  "foo": "bar",
}

After

{
  "foo": "bar"
}

docs.title: Comment
docs.text:
No comments allowed in JSONC files.

Before

{
  // This is a comment.
  "foo": "bar"
}

After

{
  "foo": "bar"
}

docs.title: Code fence style
docs.text:
Backticks style over tilde in code fences.

Before

~~~js
console.log("Hello, world!");
~~~

After

```js
console.log("Hello, world!");
```

docs.title: Duplicate blank line
docs.text:
No more than one consecutive blank line.

Before

Foo


Bar

After

Foo

Bar

docs.title: Heading style
docs.text:
ATX heading style over Setext.

Before

Big headline
============

After

# Big headline

docs.title: Highlight style
docs.text:
Emphasis and styles use asterisks first. In nested hightlight, use any non-asterisk character as the outer style.

Before

Hello **_World_**

After

Hello __*World*__

docs.title: Horizontal line style
docs.text:
Triple dash style over asterisk and underscore in horizontal lines.

Before

Foo

***

Bar

After

Foo

---

Bar

docs.title: Ordered list spaces
docs.text:
The length of ordered list number and the following space should be even number.

Before

1. Foo
1. Bar
1. Baz

---

10.  Foo2
10.  Bar2
10.  Baz2

After

1.  Foo
1.  Bar
1.  Baz

---

10. Foo2
10. Bar2
10. Baz2

docs.title: Ordered list style
docs.text:
Use lazy numbering in ordered lists. The prefix may start with any number, but the rest should follow the first one.

Before

1.  Foo
2.  Bar
3.  Baz

---

4.  Foo2
5.  Bar2
6.  Baz2

After

1.  Foo
1.  Bar
1.  Baz

---

4.  Foo2
4.  Bar2
4.  Baz2

docs.title: Table style
docs.text:
Pipes are present with short column style. Exactly one space padding on each side of cell.

Before

Foo | Bar  | Baz
--- | ---- | ----
Qux | Quux | Quuz

After

| Foo | Bar | Baz |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Qux | Quux | Quuz |

docs.title: Unnecessary blank lines in list
docs.text:
If no list item is expanded with a paragraph, remove blank lines between them. A blank line between one list item and a nested list is not checked.

Before

- Foo

- Bar

- Baz

After

- Foo
- Bar
- Baz

docs.title: Unordered list style
docs.text:
Dash style over asterisk and plus in unordered lists.

Before

* Foo
+ Bar

After

- Foo
- Bar
